message:
🐛 Fix operators hook: map backend phase→status, use single API call (#897)

- Backend returns `phase` field but frontend Operator type expects
  `status`. Map it correctly: `status = op.status || op.phase`.
- Use single API call to `/api/gitops/operators` (no cluster param)
  and let the backend handle parallel cluster queries, instead of
  making sequential per-cluster calls from the frontend.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
